title: ghost in Z Ward footsteps and key sounds
publication_or_organisation: Adelaide's notorious Z Ward asylum opens for after-dark ghost tours; 891 ABC Adelaide
australian_relation: ABC public article naming Z Ward at Glenside and reporting paranormal investigation claims tied to the asylum building.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC page names Z Ward at Glenside as the paranormal investigation site; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Z Ward point.
evidence_summary: ABC reported that Z Ward at Glenside had opened for after-dark ghost tours and that tour staff conducted preliminary investigations. The article says several members heard what they believed were footsteps ascending the building's steel staircase, and Alison Oborn reported hearing what sounded like a key turning in a door lock while photographing the site.
